parameters.content:
## AI Cost Monitor

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set AI_COST_EMAIL_TO and spending limits
3. Feed usage data from OpenAI API or internal tracking
4. Code nodes compute costs per model, per workflow, budget burn rate — no LLM needed
5. Approval gate before cost report is distributed

parameters.subject: =APPROVAL REQUIRED: AI Cost Report — ${{ $json.total_cost }} spent ({{ $json.budget_pct }}% of budget){{ $json.alert ? ' ⚠️' : '' }}
=AI Cost Report: ${{ $('Format Cost Report').first().json.total_cost }} — {{ $('Format Cost Report').first().json.period.start }}
